# Access Lens

> Framework-agnostic access observability SDK for modern SaaS apps. Records every gated UI decision (sidebar, tab, button, route, field, select option) with the combined reason — permission + feature flag + plan + entitlement + tenant config + custom condition. Headless core + React + DOM overlay adapters.

Access Lens is not a flag SDK or RBAC library. It's an *observability layer* over whichever decision engine you use (CASL, Casbin, OPA, Permify, OpenFGA, LaunchDarkly, GrowthBook, etc.). Composes their outputs into one decision per UI surface, with a debug overlay that explains every hidden element.

## Packages

- `@access-lens/core` (10 kB gz, headless, zero deps) — typed lens, snapshot, evaluator
- `@access-lens/react` (6 kB gz, React 18/19 peer) — `AccessLensProvider`, `AccessGate`, hooks
- `@access-lens/dom` (11 kB gz) — framework-agnostic floating debug overlay

## Docs

- [What is Access Lens?](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/what-is-it): Problem it solves, target users
- [Install](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/install): npm/pnpm/yarn/bun commands
- [Quick start](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/quick-start): Five-minute setup
- [Concepts](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/concepts): Nodes, reasons, snapshots, debug mode
- [Access control models](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/access-control-models): RBAC, ABAC, PBAC, ReBAC compatibility
- [defineAccessLens](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/define-access-lens): Typed lens config
- [Permissions](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/permissions): `al.permission(key, granted)`
- [Plans & entitlements](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/plans-entitlements): Ordered plans, boolean entitlements
- [Feature flags](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/feature-flags): boolean/variant/percent/date/killswitch
- [Surfaces](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/surfaces): Typed surface IDs
- [Backend integration](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/backend-integration): Four wiring patterns
- [AccessLensProvider](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/provider): React provider + debug mode
- [AccessGate](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/access-gate): The gate component
- [Hooks](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/hooks): `useAccessGate`, `useAccessLensSnapshot`
- [Debug overlay](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/guide/debug-overlay): Floating panel + hover highlights

## API reference

- [defineAccessLens](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/define-access-lens)
- [evaluateAccess](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/evaluate-access)
- [AccessLensClient](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/client)
- [Types](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/types)
- [createReactBindings](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/create-react-bindings)
- [AccessGate (React)](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/access-gate)
- [Hooks (React)](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/hooks)
- [createAccessLensOverlay (DOM)](https://access-lens-theta.vercel.app/api/create-access-lens-overlay)
